Home  /  Feedback

Submit Your Feedback

Your voice drives our institutional growth. Please share your experience with us so we can continue to improve the UGIP ecosystem.

Feedback Form

Excellent

Why Feedback Matters

Every insight you share helps us refine our processes and campus environment. We focus on:

Academic Quality

Adapting teaching methodologies based on student engagement.

Infrastructure

Upgrading laboratories and library resources as per your needs.

Safe Environment

Ensuring a disciplined and secure campus for all students.

Direct Response

Our administrative team reviews every submission within 48 hours.

The Feedback Lifecycle

Understand what happens after you hit the submit button.

1. Submission

You record your thoughts on our secure feedback portal.

2. Review

The feedback is verified and categorized by our committee.

3. Action

Relevant departments receive reports to implement changes.

4. Outcome

Suggestions are translated into tangible campus improvements.

Community Feedback Wall

Read what students and faculty are saying about their journey at UGIP Nainital.

Loading community feedback...

Frequently Asked Questions

Is my information confidential?
Yes, your data is secure. We use your contact information only to follow up if specific details are required. You may also provide a pseudonym if you wish to remain anonymous.
How long does it take for action to be taken?
We review every submission within 48 hours. Depending on the complexity of the suggestion, improvements are typically visible within 1 to 2 weeks.
Can I report a formal grievance here?
This portal is for general feedback and suggestions. For formal complaints or serious grievances, we recommend visiting the "Contact Us" page or meeting the Grievance Cell directly.
Feedback submitted!
